title: Undertake environmental field-based monitoring
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Undertake environmental field-based monitoring demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Confirm requirements for field monitoring activities

pcs.text: Clarify the purpose, objectives and the defined site for the field monitoring activities with supervising staff
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clarify the purpose, objectives and the defined site for the field monitoring activities with supervising staff?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clarify the purpose, objectives and the defined site for the field monitoring activities with supervising staff.

pcs.text: Review all emergency plans, risk assessments, and safety and environmental requirements associated with the field activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review all emergency plans, risk assessments, and safety and environmental requirements associated with the field activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review all emergency plans, risk assessments, and safety and environmental requirements associated with the field activities.

pcs.text: Review and discuss the detailed work program with supervising staff
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review and discuss the detailed work program with supervising staff?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and discuss the detailed work program with supervising staff.

pcs.text: Clarify the need for permits and any access restrictions or local concerns at field site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clarify the need for permits and any access restrictions or local concerns at field site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clarify the need for permits and any access restrictions or local concerns at field site.

pcs.text: Clarify details of all samples to be collected and field parameters to be measured
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clarify details of all samples to be collected and field parameters to be measured?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clarify details of all samples to be collected and field parameters to be measured.

pcs.text: Confirm final data formats will suit stakeholders who receive or use the data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm final data formats will suit stakeholders who receive or use the data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm final data formats will suit stakeholders who receive or use the data.

pcs.text: Review existing in-house protocols and/or associated in-house requirements that relate to field sampling, monitoring and data quality procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review existing in-house protocols and/or associated in-house requirements that relate to field sampling, monitoring and data quality procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review existing in-house protocols and/or associated in-house requirements that relate to field sampling, monitoring and data quality procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Confirm requirements for field monitoring activities

elements.title: Prepare for field monitoring activities

pcs.text: Develop checklists, based on work program, to facilitate correct preparation of field activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop checklists, based on work program, to facilitate correct preparation of field activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop checklists, based on work program, to facilitate correct preparation of field activities.

pcs.text: Identify and implement all actions required under workplace emergency plan, risk assessment, and environment, safety and data quality procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and implement all actions required under workplace emergency plan, risk assessment, and environment, safety and data quality procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and implement all actions required under workplace emergency plan, risk assessment, and environment, safety and data quality procedures.

pcs.text: Complete all administrative requirements and obtain appropriate approvals/permits
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete all administrative requirements and obtain appropriate approvals/permits?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete all administrative requirements and obtain appropriate approvals/permits.

pcs.text: Prepare and check all instruments, equipment, materials and supplies required to implement field program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and check all instruments, equipment, materials and supplies required to implement field program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and check all instruments, equipment, materials and supplies required to implement field program.

pcs.text: Confirm correct and safe use of equipment and details of field activities with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm correct and safe use of equipment and details of field activities with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm correct and safe use of equipment and details of field activities with supervisor.

pcs.text: Arrange and check correct operation, packaging and transportation of all supplies and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Arrange and check correct operation, packaging and transportation of all supplies and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange and check correct operation, packaging and transportation of all supplies and equipment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare for field monitoring activities

elements.title: Perform field activities

pcs.text: Establish and maintain field camp in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish and maintain field camp in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish and maintain field camp in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Perform field sampling, monitoring, data collection and recording in accordance with the agreed work program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform field sampling, monitoring, data collection and recording in accordance with the agreed work program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform field sampling, monitoring, data collection and recording in accordance with the agreed work program.

pcs.text: Label all samples and complete data sheets and field log book in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Label all samples and complete data sheets and field log book in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Label all samples and complete data sheets and field log book in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Store samples/specimens in accordance with any special requirements for continued wellbeing, viability or integrity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store samples/specimens in accordance with any special requirements for continued wellbeing, viability or integrity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store samples/specimens in accordance with any special requirements for continued wellbeing, viability or integrity.

pcs.text: Perform all tests and operate all equipment according to workplace instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform all tests and operate all equipment according to workplace instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform all tests and operate all equipment according to workplace instructions.

pcs.text: Store and maintain equipment and, where appropriate, calibrate instruments during field activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store and maintain equipment and, where appropriate, calibrate instruments during field activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store and maintain equipment and, where appropriate, calibrate instruments during field activities.

pcs.text: Perform all activities safely with minimal impact on the environment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform all activities safely with minimal impact on the environment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform all activities safely with minimal impact on the environment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Perform field activities

elements.title: Close down field monitoring activities

pcs.text: Arrange and check final packaging and transportation of all samples, equipment and supplies back to home base
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Arrange and check final packaging and transportation of all samples, equipment and supplies back to home base?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange and check final packaging and transportation of all samples, equipment and supplies back to home base.

pcs.text: Ensure that monitoring/camp site is left in accordance with workplace and environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure that monitoring/camp site is left in accordance with workplace and environmental requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure that monitoring/camp site is left in accordance with workplace and environmental requirements.

pcs.text: Ensure all samples and data are stored safely
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure all samples and data are stored safely?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure all samples and data are stored safely.

pcs.text: Ensure dispatch of collected samples for subsequent analysis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure dispatch of collected samples for subsequent analysis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure dispatch of collected samples for subsequent analysis.

pcs.text: Test and, if required, decontaminate equipment before storage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Test and, if required, decontaminate equipment before storage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Test and, if required, decontaminate equipment before storage.

pcs.text: Report results, noting any anomalies with users, data analysers and/or supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report results, noting any anomalies with users, data analysers and/or supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report results, noting any anomalies with users, data analysers and/or supervisor.
